name: Life360 Inc.
analysis: 360 has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$23.0700. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.8400, stop A$20.5722, target A$27.0700 (0.99:1) — then trail it.
